scripts.test:e2e: npm run build && npm run e2e:prepare:force && npm run test:e2e:run
scripts.test:e2e:headed: npm run build && npm run e2e:prepare:force && playwright test --headed
scripts.test:e2e:ui: npm run build && npm run e2e:prepare:force && playwright test --ui
scripts.test:e2e:walkthrough: npm run build && npm run e2e:prepare:force && playwright test --project=walkthrough
scripts.test:e2e:fixture: npm run build && npm run e2e:prepare:force && playwright test --project=fixture
scripts.test:e2e:replay: npm run build && npm run e2e:prepare:force && playwright test --project=replay
